overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai character walking through a vast golden grassland with autumn mountains in the background. The weather transitions from clear sunshine to overcast clouds and back, with the character traversing fields of tall grass and white wildflowers.

events.description: clouds begin to obscure the sun, transitioning from bright sunlight to diffused light

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall golden grass toward distant mountains, wearing traditional samurai attire with sword and bow on back

entered.detail: hazy mountain peaks with autumn foliage covering the slopes
dense trees with orange and red fall colors lining the left side
tall golden-yellow grass swaying in the wind covering the ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a vast open field of golden grass under a clear afternoon sky. Distant mountains with autumn-colored forests rise in the background. As the segment progresses, clouds begin to roll in, gradually obscuring the bright sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassland with bushes on the right side

events.description: sky becomes fully overcast with grey clouds covering the sun, changing the lighting to diffused
character slightly turns to the right while continuing forward, bringing bushes into view

agents.ego_description: walking through the field as the weather becomes overcast, passing by dense bushes on the right side

entered.detail: thick shrubbery with autumn-colored foliage lining the right side of the path
rocky outcropping becoming visible in the middle distance

segments.scene_description: Under overcast skies, the character continues walking through the golden grass field. Dense bushes appear on the right side, and a distant rock formation becomes visible ahead. The lighting is now diffused and grey as clouds cover the sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: field with white wildflowers and distant rock formations

events.description: field transitions to include prominent patches of white wildflowers among the golden grass
clouds begin to break apart, allowing sunlight to filter through and brighten the scene

agents.ego_description: continuing through the meadow now filled with white wildflowers, heading toward the distant mountains as the weather clears

entered.detail: patches of white fluffy flowers growing throughout the grass field in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a beautiful field dotted with white wildflowers. The bushes on the right fall behind as the path opens up. The sky begins to clear, with sunlight breaking through the clouds and illuminating the distant rock formations and mountains ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vast golden grassland as the weather shifts from bright sunshine to an overcast haze and back again. It begins with the character walking under a clear afternoon sky toward distant autumn-colored mountains, though clouds gradually roll in to obscure the sun. As the lighting becomes diffused and grey, the camera moves past dense bushes on the right toward a distant rock formation visible through the overcast gloom. The scene then opens into a field dotted with white wildflowers as the bushes fall behind, while sunlight breaks through the clouds to once again illuminate the mountains and rocks ahead.
